lead_signal.headline: No new FIMI operations identified this week — see coverage notes.
lead_signal.confidence_basis: No Tier 1-3 disclosures or reports on new operations in past 7 days across specified actors.
lead_signal.note: Quiet week consistent with post-election patterns; one non-Tier source notes ongoing but pre-week activity.

weekly_brief_narrative: No new FIMI operations were identified across Russia, China, Iran, Gulf states, United States, and Israel in the week ending 2026-04-18. Tier 1 sources—Meta CIB reports, Google TAG, Microsoft MSTIC, EUvsDisinfo, US GEC, and government attributions—returned no publications on fresh campaigns or takedowns. Tier 2 outlets including Stanford Internet Observatory, EU DisinfoLab, and EDMO issued no bulletins on new activity. Tier 3 OSINT from DFRLab, ASPI, and Bellingcat similarly lacked updates on the six actors. This absence aligns with post-election lulls following Slovenia's March 2026 parliamentary vote, where prior monitoring noted regional networks but no Tier 1-3 confirmation of state attribution. A non-Tier civil society report detailed a 'Balkan Disinformation Corridor' involving Hungary-Serbia-Russia-North Macedonia hubs targeting Slovenia via Telegram deepfakes and cross-platform amplification; however, it relies on pattern observation without platform disclosures or forensic analysis, triggering MF2 (single-source attribution) and MF3 (not independently verifiable). No platform enforcement actions reported: Meta, Google, X/Twitter, and TikTok issued no CIB-equivalent updates. X/Twitter transparency remains structurally absent per 2026 baseline—no reports since 2022, EU Code withdrawal, and API limits hinder OSINT. Actor postures unchanged: Russia and China maintain high AI-FIMI baselines (Doppelganger, Spamouflage evolutions) but no new signals; Iran, Gulf, US, Israel at episodic/assessed levels with OSINT gaps. Notable absence: no AI-generation confirmations in Tier 1-2, despite 2026 calibration expecting embedded use. Coverage reflects detection challenges in AI-embedded ops reducing infrastructure footprints. Prior week's monitor (w/e 2026-04-16) confirmed quiet signal, reinforcing pattern. Overall, signal void indicates monitoring phase rather than escalation.

research_coverage.x_twitter_gap_note: No transparency reports; API restrictions limit third-party monitoring of potential CIB patterns.
